advice_boundary: Use this atlas to explain source roles and verification needs only. Do not decide coverage, eligibility, claims, medical suitability, purchase value, or provider ranking.

allowed_uses: explain PhilHealth as public health insurance anchor
route users to official benefit and member-service pages
source_roles.refresh_cadence: before every external-facing release or source-sensitive update

allowed_uses: verify whether an HMO appears in an Insurance Commission list
explain HMO product-form categories and regulatory source boundaries
separate authorization evidence from provider marketing
blocked_uses: claim a provider currently covers a specific hospital or doctor
source_roles.refresh_cadence: before adding or removing regulated entities and before release

allowed_uses: identify product families already linked to a canonical registry entity
source_roles.refresh_cadence: before product deep dives and before comparison output

allowed_uses: support task planning and skill extraction ideas
blocked_uses: serve as active callable dependency skill
source_roles.refresh_cadence: when changing workflow design or selecting a new workflow family
